@graph.name: Colorado Gambler
@graph.description: Colorado's casino authority since 1991 — covering Black Hawk, Central City, and Cripple Creek.

@graph.name: Colorado Gambler
@graph.description: Colorado's original casino gaming publication, founded in 1991 by Patrick Sweeney. Covering Black Hawk, Central City, and Cripple Creek.

@graph.name: Colorado Gambler
@graph.description: Colorado casino guide and gaming publication

@graph.name: Colorado Casino Towns
@graph.description: The three licensed casino gaming towns in Colorado

item.name: Black Hawk
item.description: Colorado's largest casino gaming destination with 9 licensed casinos including Ameristar, Isle, and Monarch.

item.name: Central City
item.description: Historic Victorian gaming town with 5 licensed casinos and the Central City Opera House.

item.name: Cripple Creek
item.description: High-altitude gaming town above Pikes Peak with 8 licensed casinos.

@graph.name: Colorado Gambler Historic Podcasts
@graph.description: Historic Colorado gaming stories in audio — from the 1991 vote that legalized casino gaming to the first year of legal sports betting.
